caption: A meeting of the "House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs" takes place in a professional setting with people seated at long wooden tables. The scene features several individuals in business attire; in the early frames, men in suits and women in professional wear are seated, some appearing to talk or look at documents. A man with long gray hair and a beard wears a dark suit jacket over a white shirt. As the sequence progresses, the focus shifts to a man with short gray hair and glasses who is gesturing with his hand while speaking. He wears a dark suit and white shirt. A camera is visible in one frame, held by a person partially seen on the left. A logo reading "ORCA" and the text "April 12, 2019" and "S.23 Increasing the Minimum Wage" appear on a green and white banner at the bottom.
